title: Surgeon Vacancy at Pfizer India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Pfizer India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Pfizer India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Pfizer India:
Pfizer India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pfizer India!
